title: Kenyan Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and colorful dish inspired by the cuisine of Kenya, featuring marinated lamb on skewers.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Kenyan spices, garlic, and salt.
Add lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well.
Thread lamb, spring onions, and sweet potatoes onto skewers.
Brush skewers with olive oil and grill for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Remove skewers from grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
